title: Rewrite numbered/1 with Enum.with_index and Enum.map
prompt: Refactor `MyApp.Collector.numbered/1` from test_fixtures/list_append_loop.ex. The current version is explicit recursion with `acc ++ [{n, head}]`. Rewrite using `Enum.with_index(1) |> Enum.map(fn {head, n} -> {n, head} end)`. Output a complete `defmodule MyApp.Collector do ... end` with just numbered.
tier_rationale: Requires knowing Enum.with_index/2 with offset — less common than Enum.map.
